sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_atf_step"> <sys_atf_step action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <callable_outputs/> <copied_from/> <description>Run Server Side Validation Script</description> <display_name>Run Server Side Script</display_name> <inputs/> <mugshots_cache_json/> <notes>Create test users</notes> <order>1</order> <step_config display_value="Run Server Side Script">41de4a935332120028bc29cac2dc349a</step_config> <sys_class_name>sys_atf_step</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2020-11-12 12:39:34</sys_created_on> <sys_id>f706e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5d</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>Run Server Side Script</sys_name> <sys_package display_value="DevTools WORK IN PROGRESS" source="x_snc_devtools">d689f6901bd38450a89720a8ec4bcbfd</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="DevTools WORK IN PROGRESS">d689f6901bd38450a89720a8ec4bcbfd</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_atf_step_f706e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5d</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2021-11-11 09:45:20</sys_updated_on> <table/> <test display_value="DevTools - IsUserSecurityAdmin">bf06ed3b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcbcc</test> <timeout/> <warning_message/> </sys_atf_step> <sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=f706e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5d"/> <sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <document>sys_atf_step</document> <document_key>f706e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5d</document_key> <order>100</order> <sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2020-11-12 12:39:34</sys_created_on> <sys_id>3706e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5f</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2020-11-12 12:39:34</sys_updated_on> <value>3.1</value> <variable display_value="Jasmine version">42f2564b73031300440211d8faf6a777</variable> </sys_variable_value> <sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <document>sys_atf_step</document> <document_key>f706e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5d</document_key> <order>200</order> <sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2020-11-12 12:39:34</sys_created_on> <sys_id>7f06e17b1b9ce050a89720a8ec4bcb5f</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2020-11-12 12:39:34</sys_updated_on> <value>var testdata = new TestDataAPI('_ATF_DEVTOOLS_');  testdata.CreateUser('ADMIN',['admin','itil']); testdata.CreateUser('ITIL',['itil']);</value> <variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable> </sys_variable_value> </record_update>
